failures.description: The agent fabricated a cheapest item and price instead of using the actual lowest-priced tool result, item 5339029584 at $1128.99.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone using the ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool call at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor introduced item 0000000000 priced at $0.01, which is absent from the user request, plan, and tool output. This fabricated item and price directly determine the final answer. The later Evaluator approves the fabricated answer, so the failure is not resolved.
